//: Satellite imagery is ~2 TB in full — too large to mirror. Keep only z0-12
locally (~700 GB) and serve z16+ straight from the CDN, stacked via VPL.
build: convert only z0-12 from the CDN into the local subset.
serveCurrent: local subset for z0-12, CDN for z16+ (first-match + filters).
serveTransitional defaults to remote (whole dataset from the CDN while rebuilding).
name: satellite

serveCurrent.pipeline: from_stacked [ from_container filename="{LOCAL}/satellite.versatiles" | filter level_max=12, from_container filename="{CDN}/satellite.versatiles" | filter level_min=16 ]

//: Served osm is osm + landcover-vectors merged into one container
is therefore NOT served on its own.
versionInputs: rebuild whenever EITHER osm or landcover-vectors changes upstream.
build: merge both CDN sources into a brotli local file (attribution baked in).
serveTransitional: kind vpl with no pipeline ⇒ reuse build.pipeline, i.e. merge
both CDN sources live (with attribution) while the local file is being rebuilt.
serveCurrent defaults to local (the baked, merged file).
name: osm

build.pipeline: from_merged_vector [ from_container filename="{CDN}/osm.versatiles", from_container filename="{CDN}/landcover-vectors.versatiles" ] | meta_update attribution='© OpenStreetMap contributors, VersaTiles sources'
